name: KKB BCA
description: Secured auto financing for new/used passenger cars or refinancing.
price: 2.70% flat p.a. (3-year tenor); or 5-year Fix & Cap (5.00% first 3 years, 6.77% next 2 years).
fees: 1% provision fee; Fiduciary fees: IDR 300k (<IDR ( 2M 50M) IDR to>IDR 1B).
limits: Monthly income must be >= 3x the requested installment amount.
requirements: Age 21–64 at loan maturity, >= 2 years permanent work/business history, comprehensive insurance.
benefits & features: Flat rate stability, hybrid Fix & Cap certainty, refinancing against BPKB.
